ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: html
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Hysteria, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: htr-tech/zphisher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/htr-tech/zphisher
Language: html
An automated phishing tool with 30+ templates. This Tool is made for educational purpose only ! Author will not be responsible for any misuse of this toolkit !

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nicobailon/visual-explainer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nicobailon/visual-explainer
Language: html
Agent skill that generates rich HTML pages or slide decks for diagrams, diff reviews, plan audits, data tables, and project recaps

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ripienaar/free-for-dev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ripienaar/free-for-dev
Language: html
A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice
Language: html
from vibe coding to agentic engineering - practice makes claude perfect

ns0:entry.ns0:title: techchipnet/CamPhish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/techchipnet/CamPhish
Language: html
Grab cam shots & GPS location from target's phone front camera or PC webcam just sending a link.
